channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 21.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: PM will not block Burnham from by-election despite paving way for Labour leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: PM will not block Burnham from by-election despite paving way for Labour leadership challenge

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - UK politics live
item.description: Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work? These are the next steps
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work? These are the next steps

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Who is Josh Simons, the Labour MP who quit for Andy Burnham?
item.description: Who is Josh Simons, the Labour MP who quit for Andy Burnham?

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Streeting has seen which way the wind is blowing and it is blowing towards Greater Manchester
My analysis on the kind of day when years happen.
www.theguardian.com/politics/202...
item.description:

My analysis on the kind of day when years happen.

item.title: The Guardian: The Guardian view on a cabinet resignation: Labour’s leadership crisis is really an identity crisis | Editorial - The Guardian
item.description: The Guardian view on a cabinet resignation: Labour’s leadership crisis is really an identity crisis | Editorial - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour MP to stand down to allow Burnham run for byelection amid leadership row
item.description: Labour MP to stand down to allow Burnham run for byelection amid leadership row

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham says he will try to become MP for Makerfield
item.description: Burnham says he will try to become MP for Makerfield

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham confirms he intends to run for parliament after MP stands aside - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham confirms he intends to run for parliament after MP stands aside - ITVX
